infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Camera is used to capture owner photos and record loan verification videos.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Microphone is used for recording loan verification videos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Photo library access to upload owner and agreement photos.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Location is used to record property geo-coordinates.
